## [00:00 - 03:02]

So the FATC Facebook group is a huge part of your membership so definitely make sure you join into it as soon as possible. The link to the group is below this video in the text. So when you join or when you request to join the group you will have to answer a couple of questions so I'll just show you what those questions are here. You'll get asked if you've purchased the membership, if you have then you will answer yes and then you'll get asked what the email address you use to purchase the program with. So make sure that email address matches the one that you did purchase with because we'll need to check the membership against that email address so to make it quicker for yourself answer those questions as soon as possible and answer them accurately and please give us at least 48 hours to accept your request due to time zone differences. The group is super important for a couple of reasons. Firstly it's going to enable you to connect with your peers. There's a lot of you guys in the membership and it can be really valuable to make those connections with people all over the world also running Facebook ads so you'll be able to connect with each other, tap into the support. All of the coaches are in the group they've ready to answer your questions and you'll be able to join the calls and watch all the replays of the calls in the group as well. So anytime you have a question about the course or about a campaign not about your membership or subscription for those please email us so you'll find information on that in the support section of the student portal. But if you have a question about the course content maybe you don't understand how rapid fire testing works or you don't know how to apply a certain aspect to one of your campaigns or you're just you're having trouble with one of your campaigns and you need some help you'll write your question in here and the coaches can answer that for you. So it's really important when you do post them that you tag your question with a relevant topic so if you have an e-com question, campaign not working obviously you want to be a bit more specific than this you would then go under here and add topics and you would tag this as an e-com question. So because we're now combining all of the programs into one and there's so many different niches involved and people from all different areas we want to make sure that you guys can find content that's relevant to you and find questions that relate to the niches that you're actually working on. So if everyone tags the questions you'll be able to use this feature at the side here with the popular topics and posts to find questions that are relevant to your niche. So to use the topics over here what you would do is select the one that you want and if you're not seeing it try clicking on these dots and it'll open all of the topics but for now if we were to example for example to choose coaches and online courses it's going to show me all of the posts that have been tagged with that topic so right now there's only one because I've just set that up but make sure that you're using that going forward and we'll have a nice tidy group and you guys be able to access everything that you need really quickly which will be great. So all of the call posts are also posted in here so access to join the calls via the links there's a video on that coming up in the student portal so make sure you watch that to find out how to get on the calls and

## [03:02 - 04:44]

how to find the posts and where to find the replays. The next important section is announcements over here so in the announcement section you'll find any updates about the program or updates if anything is changing about calls and things like that so check into that frequently just in case there's something that you've missed and you can also access announcements here on the left and it will list them out here as well. The next section to be aware of is units and units is where you'll find any Facebook ad tips the weekly Facebook ad updates that come from cat as well as agency tips so we try to categorize things there so that you guys can find content quickly too. You've also got the files section here which houses the replays again that's covered in the next video covering the group calls and then lastly the other thing to be aware of is the member of the month so every month we'll post a survey in the group where you can submit names for people that have helped you out or really contributed to your membership giving you a good experience it's limited to students only so I know that the moderators are amazing but there's a separate nomination for them so when you're submitting that make sure to choose a student someone who's really helped you out and given you value inside the community because we really value you guys as members and we want to reward the person who's contributed the most every month to say thank you and in exchange that person will get a one month free membership inside of FATC so make sure you nominate that when that comes up typically gets posted towards the end of the month so keep an eye out and then keep an eye out for the announcement to see who won each month as well so now that you know all about the Facebook group make sure you jump in request to join and once you're in there introduce yourself say hello there's a lot of friendly faces in there and we're excited to have you on board
